reference: Hello doctor, I had unprotected intercourse with my partner during the fourth day of my menstrual period. I took Unwanted seventy-two after the intercourse. After taking it, I have immense body pain, especially in the lower abdomen. My menstrual bleeding has stopped. Is the pain normal? When can I expect my next menstrual period?
text: Hello, Doctor. I had unprotected intercourse with my partner during the fourth day of my menstrual period. I took unwanted 72 after the intercourse. After taking it, I have immense body pain, especially in the lower abdomen. My menstrual bleeding has stopped. Is the pain normal? When can I expect my next menstrual period?
